content.full_text:
RALPH J. GRANT
505-14TH STREET, SUITE 950
OAKLAND, CALIFORNIA 94612

(415) 832-0257

February 8, 1990


Ms. Kathryn Donovan
General Counsel,
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Ms. Donovan,

This is a request for formal advice. Given the following where each partner has an equal share in ownership and control of the business:

EXAMPLE 1: 2 Partners.

EXAMPLE 2: 3 Partners

EXAMPLE 3: 4 Partners

EXAMPLE 4: 5 Partners

QUESTION: In each instance, if the business contributes $1000 to a candidate, how many other partners may contribute $1000 to the same candidate?

QUESTION: In each instance, if the business does not contribute $1000 to a candidate, how many of the partners may contribute $1000 to the same candidate?

QUESTION: In each instance, if the business contributes $1000 to a candidate and if two of the partners are married to each other, which partners may contribute $1000 to the same candidate?

QUESTION: in each instance, if the business does not contribute $1000 to a candidate and if two of the partners are married to each other, which partners may contribute $1000 to the same candidate?

Thank you very much for your attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Ralph J. Grant
Treasurer,
Elihu Harris for Mayor Committee
ID#890449

Steve Peace is slinging mud at Darrel Van de Veld because he knows he can't win a clean fight!

BULK RATE

PAID

San Diego, CA

THE GALLAGHER FAMILY
404 OXFORD ST
CHULA VISTA, CA 92011

Peace Levels
More personal
attacks against
Van de Veld

1. Steve Pade-Latins Darrell
Van de Veld come from Sea
Francisco to Chula Vista to run
for office.

Here's the truth:
In San Diego County since the age
of 5 a attorney and moved
to San attempted USA to attend
law school at Hastings College.

2. Severe Peace has attacked
Darrell's family saying the local
details mention he attended by
Darrell's children writing
money to his campaign.

He's the effort
to fell others
NOT contributed any runs
to Darrell's campaign.

Steve Peace's
name change
LIE

Severe peace claims that
Darrell Van veld changed
his name to run for office.

Here's the truth:
Darrell separates his last
Dutch wasted by relatives
Some family members prefer
one word—vanderveld.

Why all these
[illegible]

personal attacks
instead of debating
the issues?

Because Big Money
interests paying
Steve Peace want to
cover-up the real issues!

(See the list of payments to Steve
Peace on the next page to see who
really is behind the attacks on
Darrel Van de Veld"!

Where is my 20%
reduction in
auto insurance rates?

Crime is
out of control.

Big Money
interests control our
State Legislature.

Concerned Voter

JUL 18 '90 17:19 ASSEMBLYMAN STEVE S PEACE TEL NO:619 696-5430 HB41 P04F.5

[Due to the image quality, rotation, and heavy black redaction marks obscuring significant portions of the document, I cannot reliably transcribe the complete text content with confidence. The document appears to be a faxed legislative document from July 18, 1990, but most of the body text is either illegible, obscured by black redaction marks, or at angles that make accurate transcription impossible without risking significant errors.]

embedding.first_500_words: February 8, 1990 Ms. Kathryn Donovan General Counsel, Fair Political Practices Commission P.O. Box 807 Sacramento, CA 95804 Dear Ms. Donovan, This is a request for formal advice. Given the following where each partner has an equal share in ownership and control of the business: EXAMPLE 1: 2 Partners. EXAMPLE 2: 3 Partners EXAMPLE 3: 4 Partners EXAMPLE 4: 5 Partners QUESTION: In each instance, if the business contributes $1000 to a candidate, how many other partners may contribute $1000 to the same candidate? QUESTION: In each instance, if the business does not contribute $1000 to a candidate, how many of the partners may contribute $1000 to the same candidate? QUESTION: In each instance, if the business contributes $1000 to a candidate and if two of the partners are married to each other, which partners may contribute $1000 to the same candidate? QUESTION: In each instance, if the business does not contribute $1000 to a candidate and if two of the partners are married to each other, which partners may contribute $1000 to the same candidate? Thank you very much for your attention to this matter. Sincerely, Ralph J. Grant Treasurer, Elihu Harris for Mayor Committee ID#890449 The image is a black and white political advertisement. The text reads: "Steve Peace is slinging mud at Darrel Van de Veld because he knows he can't win a clean fight!" There is also some additional text in the upper right corner that says: "BULK RATE U.S. Postage PAID Permit No. 1839 San Diego, CA" And another address in the upper right corner: "THE GALLAGHER FAMILY 494 OXFORD ST CHULA VISTA, CA 92011" At the bottom of the image, there is a note indicating the publisher: "Publisher by Van de Veld for Assembly. ID#BH22. Charles Conner, Treasurer." The image contains two columns of text, each with a heading and some content. Here is the transcribed text: --- **Steve Peace's "name change" LIE** Steve Peace claims that Darrel Van de Veld changed his name to run for office. Here's the truth: Darrel separates his last name in the traditional Dutch way used by his brothers and many relatives. Some family members prefer one word — Vandeveld. 1. Steve Peace claims Darrel Van de Veld came from San Francisco to Chula Vista to run for office. Here's the truth: Darrel Van de Veld has lived in San Diego County since the age of 5, attended UCSD, and moved to San Francisco just to attend law school at Hastings College! 2. Steve Peace has attacked Darrel's family saying the local retail clerks' union, headed by Darrel's father, is contributing money to his campaign. Here's the truth: The retail clerks' union has NOT contributed any funds to Darrel's campaign. --- The image contains several thought bubbles with statements from a "Concerned Voter." Here are the main points: 1. "personal attacks instead of debating the issues?" 2. "Because Big Money interests paying Steve Peace want to cover-up the real issues! (See the list of payments to Steve Peace
